scope_coverage.description: How completely each vendor covers all 8 RFQ line items

V001.rationale: Highest extracted scope coverage score (88) with one explicit gap: English TVC only as adaptation, not independently developed.

V002.rationale: Lowest extracted scope coverage score (62). Major uncovered items include broadcast TVC production being TBD and formal ASCI/FSSAI compliance review not covered.

V003.rationale: Moderate-to-strong extracted scope coverage score (75), but English TVC is at extra cost and independent compliance reviewer is not named.

scope_coverage.comparability_note: Comparable at a high level because all three vendors have extracted scope coverage scores and explicit uncovered items. However, exact mapping to all 8 RFQ line items is not provided in the extraction, so comparison is directional rather than line-by-line.

pricing_clarity.description: How clear, complete, and comparable the pricing is

V001.rationale: Pricing is present, in INR, excludes GST, and passes consistency check with itemized total matching stated total.

V002.rationale: Pricing is only partial. Total is stated, but some influencer fees are quoted in USD, creating currency inconsistency and reducing comparability.

V003.rationale: Pricing is conflicting. Stated total (INR 3.90Cr) does not match itemized total (INR 3.64Cr), leaving INR 26L unexplained.
key_gaps: INR 26L discrepancy between stated and itemized totals

V001.note: Stated total in INR, excludes GST, consistency check PASS.

V002.note: NOT COMPARABLE — total stated as INR 1,75,00,000 but some influencer fees are in USD and pricing status is partial.

V003.note: NOT COMPARABLE — stated total INR 3,90,00,000 conflicts with itemized total INR 3,64,00,000; INR 26L unexplained.

pricing_clarity.comparability_note: NOT COMPARABLE — only V001 has internally consistent pricing. V002 has mixed-currency partial pricing, and V003 has a material discrepancy between stated and itemized totals.

commercial_completeness.description: Completeness of payment terms, validity, assumptions, exclusions

V001.rationale: No extracted data provided on payment terms, proposal validity, assumptions, or exclusions beyond GST treatment.

V002.rationale: No extracted data provided on payment terms, proposal validity, assumptions, or exclusions beyond partial pricing status.

V003.rationale: No extracted data provided on payment terms, proposal validity, assumptions, or exclusions beyond pricing conflict.

commercial_completeness.comparability_note: NOT COMPARABLE — the extraction does not include the commercial terms needed to assess this dimension for any vendor.

timeline_quality.description: Realism, clarity, and detail of proposed timelines

V001.rationale: Timeline is present as 52 weeks with consistency check PASS. This is the clearest and most internally consistent timeline among the three.

V002.rationale: Timeline is only partial: 10-12 weeks for digital, while TVC timing is TBD. Consistency is unknown.

V003.rationale: Timeline is conflicting: 6-8 weeks claimed versus 15-16 weeks in the detailed plan, with consistency check FAIL.
key_gaps: Claimed timeline conflicts with detailed plan

timeline_quality.comparability_note: Comparable on clarity and internal consistency because all vendors have some extracted timeline data. However, V002 is partial and V003 is conflicting, so only V001 provides a stable basis for planning.

compliance_quality.description: Depth and credibility of compliance coverage (ASCI, FSSAI, platforms)

V001.rationale: Strongest compliance coverage. ASCI kids code and FSSAI health claims are both covered with high detail, including a named reviewer for ASCI.

V002.rationale: Weakest compliance position. ASCI support is only via recommendation of an external specialist, and FSSAI health claims are not addressed.

V003.rationale: Compliance is mentioned but lacks credibility detail. ASCI compliance is claimed without process detail or named reviewer; FSSAI is only mentioned in passing.
key_gaps: No process detail for ASCI compliance

compliance_quality.comparability_note: Comparable at a qualitative level because all vendors have extracted ASCI/FSSAI fields. V001 is materially stronger based on detail and named accountability; V002 and V003 have partial or missing coverage.

risk_level.description: Overall risk profile based on gaps, conflicts, and assumptions

V001.rationale: Lower relative risk due to high data quality, consistent pricing, consistent timeline, and strong compliance coverage. Main risk is incomplete English TVC scope.
key_gaps: English TVC independently developed not covered

V002.rationale: Highest risk due to low data quality, partial pricing with mixed currencies, incomplete scope, missing FSSAI coverage, and incomplete timeline.

V003.rationale: High risk due to pricing conflict, timeline conflict, and weak compliance detail. Scope is stronger than V002 but still has important commercial and compliance ambiguities.

key_differentiators.finding: V001 has the highest extracted coverage score (88), V003 is mid-range (75), and V002 is materially lower (62) with broadcast TVC still TBD.
key_differentiators.buyer_implication: If full RFQ coverage is required without major add-ons or TBD items, V002 currently presents the largest scope completion risk.

key_differentiators.finding: Only V001 has internally consistent pricing. V002 has mixed-currency partial pricing, and V003 has a stated-versus-itemized mismatch of INR 26L.
key_differentiators.buyer_implication: Commercial evaluation cannot be finalized until V002 and V003 submit corrected, normalized totals.

key_differentiators.finding: V001 provides a consistent 52-week timeline; V002 provides only a digital timeline with TVC TBD; V003 has a direct conflict between headline and detailed schedule.
key_differentiators.buyer_implication: Delivery planning and launch readiness cannot be compared reliably across vendors without timeline clarification from V002 and V003.

key_differentiators.finding: V001 is the only vendor with high-detail compliance coverage and a named ASCI reviewer. V002 lacks FSSAI coverage, and V003 provides only low-detail claims.
key_differentiators.buyer_implication: For a kids/nutrition brand launch, compliance assurance is a major decision point; current compliance comparability favors only one vendor having substantiated coverage.

key_differentiators.finding: Overall extracted data quality is HIGH for V001, LOW for V002, and MEDIUM for V003.
key_differentiators.buyer_implication: Lower data quality increases clarification burden and procurement risk, especially where pricing and timeline decisions depend on complete, internally consistent submissions.

cannot_compare_because.reason: NOT COMPARABLE — V002 pricing is partial and includes USD-denominated items, while V003 pricing contains an unexplained INR 26L discrepancy.
cannot_compare_because.resolution: Ask both vendors for a corrected all-inclusive INR commercial summary with itemized totals reconciled and currency conversions fixed.

cannot_compare_because.reason: NOT COMPARABLE — no extracted data is available for payment terms, validity, assumptions, or exclusions for any vendor.
cannot_compare_because.resolution: Request a standard commercial terms sheet from all vendors covering payment milestones, quote validity, assumptions, exclusions, and change-order basis.

cannot_compare_because.reason: NOT COMPARABLE — V002 has only a partial digital timeline with TVC TBD, and V003 has conflicting timeline statements.
cannot_compare_because.resolution: Request milestone-based integrated schedules from brief approval through production, compliance review, and launch.

cannot_compare_because.reason: NOT COMPARABLE — V001 provides named and detailed compliance coverage, while V002 and V003 provide only partial or low-detail statements.
cannot_compare_because.resolution: Ask all vendors to submit their compliance workflow, reviewer credentials, approval checkpoints, and responsibility split for ASCI/FSSAI review.

critical_conflicts_detected.conflict: Stated total INR 3,90,00,000 vs itemized total INR 3,64,00,000.
critical_conflicts_detected.impact: Commercial evaluation is unreliable because INR 26L is unexplained.
critical_conflicts_detected.recommended_action: Require a corrected commercial sheet reconciling all line items to the final total before any price comparison.

critical_conflicts_detected.conflict: Timeline claimed as 6-8 weeks vs detailed plan showing 15-16 weeks.
critical_conflicts_detected.impact: Delivery feasibility and launch planning cannot be trusted as currently submitted.
critical_conflicts_detected.recommended_action: Require a single reconciled project plan with milestone dates and dependencies.

critical_conflicts_detected.conflict: Pricing mixes INR total with some USD influencer fee items.
critical_conflicts_detected.impact: True total cost exposure is unclear and may vary with conversion assumptions.
critical_conflicts_detected.recommended_action: Require all pricing to be normalized into INR with conversion basis and final rolled-up total.

buyer_attention_points.point: Do not compare vendor totals as final commercial bids yet.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Obtain normalized, internally consistent pricing from V002 and V003 before any cost ranking.

buyer_attention_points.point: Compliance coverage is materially uneven across vendors.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Confirm whether named internal/external compliance review is mandatory for award, especially for ASCI kids code and FSSAI health claims.

buyer_attention_points.point: V002 has major scope incompleteness, including broadcast TVC production being TBD.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Ask for a confirmed scope matrix against all RFQ line items and identify what is included, excluded, or subcontracted.

buyer_attention_points.point: V003 has both pricing and timeline conflicts.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Treat submission as commercially and operationally unresolved until corrected documents are received.

buyer_attention_points.point: V001 appears strongest on consistency and compliance, but English TVC independent development is not covered.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Clarify whether this gap is acceptable or requires a priced add-on / alternate delivery approach.

buyer_attention_points.point: Commercial terms cannot be assessed for any vendor from the extracted data.
buyer_attention_points.action_required: Request payment terms, validity period, assumptions, exclusions, and revision/change-order policy in a standard template.
